title: althaea microphylla
intro: Althaea microphylla, also known as marshmallow, is a perennial herb native to Australia and parts of Asia, belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae). The roots and leaves of the plant possess medicinal properties, rich in mucilages, which have been used to soothe and calm irritated mucous membranes. The health benefits of Althaea microphylla include reducing inflammation, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as coughs and sore throats. Althaea microphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, as well as being used topically in creams and ointments to promote wound healing and skin health.
